sentences.target: Hier ist es abends ganz still.

translations.de: Hier ist es abends ganz still.
translations.en: It’s very quiet here in the evenings.
translations.es: Por las tardes, aquí está muy tranquilo.
translations.fr: Le soir, c’est très calme ici.
translations.it: La sera qui è molto tranquillo.
translations.pt: À noite, aqui é bem tranquilo.
translations.vi: Buổi tối ở đây rất yên tĩnh.
translations.ar: في المساء يكون المكان هنا هادئ جدًا.
translations.nl: 's Avonds is het hier heel rustig.
translations.hi: शाम को यहाँ बहुत शांति रहती है.
translations.el: Τα βράδια εδώ είναι πολύ ήσυχα.
translations.nb: Om kvelden er det veldig stille her.
translations.id: Kalau malam, di sini sangat tenang.
translations.sv: På kvällen är det väldigt tyst här.
translations.da: Om aftenen er der meget stille her.
translations.ja: 夕方はここはとても静かです。

tokens.explanation: Locative deictic adverb setting the place; fronted frame-setting element.
Copular auxiliary (3sg pres) linking the subject placeholder to the predicate adjective.
Expletive/dummy pronoun functioning as syntactic subject with a predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb indicating the time frame.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective.
Predicative adjective serving as the clausal predicate (state: quiet/silent).

sentences.target: Die Kinder sind heute ungewöhnlich still.

translations.de: Die Kinder sind heute ungewöhnlich still.
translations.en: The kids are unusually quiet today.
translations.es: Hoy los niños están más callados de lo normal.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, les enfants sont plus silencieux que d’habitude.
translations.it: Oggi i bambini sono più silenziosi del solito.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天孩子们比平时更安静。
translations.yue: 今日啲小朋友比平時仲靜。
translations.pt: Hoje as crianças estão mais quietas do que o normal.
translations.tr: Bugün çocuklar her zamankinden daha sessiz.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bọn trẻ yên lặng hơn bình thường.
translations.ar: اليوم الأطفال هادئون أكثر من المعتاد.
translations.nl: Vandaag zijn de kinderen stiller dan normaal.
translations.hu: Ma a gyerekek a szokásosnál csendesebbek.
translations.hi: आज बच्चे सामान्य से ज्यादा शांत हैं.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj dzieci są cichsze niż zwykle.
translations.el: Σήμερα τα παιδιά είναι πιο ήσυχα από ό,τι συνήθως.
translations.nb: I dag er barna stillere enn vanlig.
translations.id: Hari ini anak-anak lebih tenang dari biasanya.
translations.sv: I dag är barnen ovanligt tysta.
translations.ro: Astăzi copiii sunt mai liniștiți decât de obicei.
translations.cs: Dnes jsou děti tišší než obvykle.
translations.da: I dag er børnene usædvanligt stille.
translations.ja: 今日は子どもたちがいつもより静かです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the noun phrase (nominative plural subject).
Common noun, plural; head of the subject NP.
Copular auxiliary (3pl pres) linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the state.
Degree adverb modifying the predicate adjective (extent: unusually).
Predicative adjective as the clausal predicate describing the subject.

sentences.target: Im Zug bleibt es plötzlich still.

translations.de: Im Zug bleibt es plötzlich still.
translations.en: On the train, it suddenly goes quiet.
translations.es: En el tren, de repente todo se queda en silencio.
translations.fr: Dans le train, tout se tait d’un coup.
translations.it: Sul treno, all’improvviso cala il silenzio.
translations.pt: No trem, de repente fica tudo silencioso.
translations.vi: Trên tàu bỗng trở nên yên lặng.
translations.nl: In de trein wordt het ineens stil.
translations.hi: ट्रेन में अचानक सब शांत हो जाता है.
translations.pl: W pociągu nagle robi się cicho.
translations.nb: På toget blir det plutselig stille.
translations.id: Di dalam kereta tiba-tiba jadi sunyi.
translations.sv: På tåget blir det plötsligt tyst.
translations.ro: În tren se face dintr-o dată liniște.
translations.cs: Ve vlaku se najednou udělá ticho.
translations.da: I toget bliver der pludselig stille.
translations.ja: 電車の中が急に静かになります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition contracted with the dative article (in + dem); introduces a locative PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition (dative singular).
Main verb (3sg pres) meaning ‘to remain’; functions copula-like, linking to the predicate.
Expletive/dummy pronoun serving as syntactic subject with a predicate adjective.
Adverb of manner/time indicating abrupt onset.
Predicative adjective expressing the resulting/maintained state.

sentences.target: Nach zehn wird es auf der Straße still.
sentences.reading: /naːx tseːn vɪʁt ʔɛs aʊf deːɐ̯ ˈʃtʁaːsə ʃtɪl/

translations.de: Nach zehn wird es auf der Straße still.
translations.ipa: /naːx tseːn vɪʁt ʔɛs aʊf deːɐ̯ ˈʃtʁaːsə ʃtɪl/
translations.en: After ten, it gets quiet on the street.
translations.es: Después de las diez, la calle se queda tranquila.
translations.fr: Après dix heures, la rue devient calme.
translations.it: Dopo le dieci, la strada diventa tranquilla.
translations.zh-Hans: 十点以后，街上就安静了。
translations.ru: После десяти на улице становится тихо.
translations.pt: Depois das dez, a rua fica tranquila.
translations.vi: Sau mười giờ, ngoài phố trở nên yên ắng.
translations.nl: Na tien uur wordt het rustig op straat.
translations.uk: Після десятої на вулиці стає тихо.
translations.hi: दस के बाद सड़क पर शांति हो जाती है.
translations.pl: Po dziesiątej na ulicy robi się cicho.
translations.el: Μετά τις δέκα, ο δρόμος ησυχάζει.
translations.nb: Etter ti blir det stille i gata.
translations.id: Sesudah jam sepuluh, jalanan jadi sepi.
translations.sv: Efter tio blir det lugnt på gatan.
translations.ro: După zece, pe stradă se face liniște.
translations.cs: Po desáté je na ulici klid.
translations.da: Efter klokken ti bliver der stille på gaden.
translations.ja: 十時を過ぎると通りは静かになります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition introducing a temporal PP (‘after’).
Cardinal number; complement of the preposition (time: ten o’clock implied).
Copular auxiliary (3sg pres) expressing change of state (‘becomes’), linking to predicate.
Expletive/dummy pronoun acting as syntactic subject with a predicate adjective.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; takes dative with static location.
Definite article (dative feminine singular) within the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition (dative singular).
Predicative adjective denoting the resulting state after the time specified.

Nach zehn wird es auf der Straße still.
